title: Careers - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Careers - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Careers at Khoury College
Join our vibrant, inclusive community
At Northeastern University and Khoury College, we strive to create a vibrant and open community characterized by collaboration, creativity, and an unwavering commitment to excellence from the multiple, diverse voices that drive our value system and decision-making process. Our core mission is to educate students for a life of fulfillment and accomplishment and to translate knowledge to meet global and societal needs, and we seek accomplished people to help us advance this mission.
What’s more, when you join Khoury College you’ll benefit from facilities designed to enhance learning and research; opportunities to teach, conduct research, and engage with industry and academic partners in tech hubs around the world in Boston and at our eight network campuses; and a robust benefits package covering health benefits, paid time off, wellness and life, retirement, tuition assistance, commuting/transportation, and much more.
Tenure-track positions
We invite applications for multiple tenure-track/tenured faculty positions at all levels, beginning academic year 2025-26.
See open tenure-track positions
Teaching faculty positions
We invite applications for both full-time and part-time positions at all levels.
See open teaching faculty positions
Staff positions
We invite applications for both full-time and part-time positions at all levels.
See open staff positions
